rulings.Case Title: 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEPARTMENT OF
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 1 PETITIONERS 2856-62 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS' ASSOCIATION, DANIEL MULDERRY, GAYLEN MULDERRY, PETER DUBOIS, LESLIE ZIMMERMAN and HENRIETTA HAGOPIAN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IN INTERVENTION Continued to December 23, 2016 to be heard with other pending motions. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to Department 501 no later than November 23, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BURKE HANSEN VS. JOSH HACHADOURIAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 13 DEFENDANTS HERBERT JAFFE, TCC UNION SQUARE L.P. and WILLIAM DIXON, JR.'s DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address in good faith all the issues raised and argued in the moving papers and reply. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOLLY SMITH-HESSELGREN VS. CAROL TWEEDLE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 14 Motion To Compel Destructive Testing DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff fails to establish "good cause" through evidence that it has taken other reasonable steps to obtain the evidence sought. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAY PARKER GAYLORD VS. DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 2 PLAINTIFF RAY GAYLORD Motion To Consolidate DENIED, moot. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAY PARKER GAYLORD VS. DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, November 15, 2016, LINE 2 DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK, NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED without leave to amend. Plaintiff's claims as alleged are barred by res judicata. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D BANKS VS. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 3 DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to December 15, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 501 for Plaintiff to file an opposition on the merits (as opposed to opposition raising procedural issues) no later than 9 court days before the new hearing date. It also appears that Plaintiff is considering a dismissal. Plaintiff may file a dismissal in lieu of opposition. Defendant shall file a reply, if any, 5 court days before the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D BANKS VS. FIRST AMERICAN TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 3 PLAINTIFF JAMES BANKS' MOTION TO STRIKE DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED. Motion to Strike is set on insufficient notice per CCP 1005. The Court considers this motion to be an opposition to the demurrer (procedural grounds only) and rejects the arguments. Under the circumstances of this case, i.e. failed settlement negotiations, the demurrer was properly filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AIDA M. PELLEGRINI VS. RICHARD P. PELLEGRINI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay And Compel Mediation And Binding Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 4 DEFENDANTS RICHARD PELLEGRINI and JEANNE SACHNOFF'S Motion To Stay And Compel Mediation And Binding Arbitration DENIED. Parties have already mediated the issues. Proper forum for partition action is the Court as stated by the mediator/arbitrator selected by the parties. Judge Bettinelli may be appointed as referee upon request of the party(ies). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ADAM O'NEILL ET AL VS. PIERRE BERTERRETCHE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action (And Awarding Attorney'S Fees And Costs)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 5 DEFENDANTS PIERRE BERTERRETCHE, MARIE BERTERRETCHE, DOMINIC BERTERRETCHE and MARIE ELISSETCHE'S Motion For Order To Expunge Notice Of Pendency Of Action (And Awarding Attorney'S Fees And Costs) GRANTED. Complaint does not state a real property claim. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that a lis pendens can properly be maintained based on claims arising out of landlord's failure to maintain habitable premises. Defendant shall recover attorney's fees in the amount of $2,405. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 7 Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank N.A.'S Motion For Sanctions Regarding Defendant'S Compliance With The Court'S Order To Compel Defendant And/Or Defendant'S Agent To Provide Plaintiff'S Counsel With A Key To The Front Gate Of The Building No Later Than 4:00 Pm On Jul-19-2016 And Osc Re: Contempt DENIED. Plaintiff failed to provide competent evidence of Defendant's non-compliance with the Court's order. Paragraph 7 of Harris Declaration is not competent admissible evidence. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE ZHANG VS. SEAN MCKEAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, November 17, 2016, line 12 DEFENDANT SEAN MCKEAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
